step1.title: 1. Find your Pixel ID
step1.desc: Go to Meta Events Manager. Select your Data Source (Pixel). Your ID is a string of numbers located under the name.

step2.title: 2. Enter your ID
step2.desc: Paste your Meta Pixel ID below to connect it to the ecosystem.

step3.title: 3. Verify Connection
step3.desc: Use the Simulator on the right to trigger events and verify they appear in the Event Console.

ga4.title: Google Analytics 4 Setup Guide
ga4.subtitle: Track user behavior and eCommerce events

step1.title: 1. Find your Measurement ID
step1.desc: Go to GA4 Admin > Data Streams > Web. Your Measurement ID starts with 'G-'.

step2.title: 2. Enter your ID
step2.desc: Paste your Measurement ID below to start tracking traffic and sales.

step3.title: 3. Verify Connection
step3.desc: Interact with the Simulator on the right. You should see events logged in the console below.
